conflict_type: Conflicts between Keyword Constraints and Phrase Constraints
seed_instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting.
org_constraint: The phrase "thank you for the opportunity" must appear at least twice in the email.
new_constraint: The keyword 'opportunity' must appear only in its plural form ('opportunities') in the email and must appear at least once.
instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The phrase "thank you for the opportunity" must appear at least twice in the email. The keyword 'opportunity' must appear only in its plural form ('opportunities') in the email and must appear at least once.
response:
Subject: Resignation - [Your Name]

Dear [Boss's Name],

Please accept this email as formal notification that I am resigning from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My last day of employment will be [Your Last Day of Employment].

This was not an easy decision, as I have genuinely valued my time here. I want to express my sincere gratitude for all the opportunities I have been given during my tenure. I have learned so much from you and the team, and I appreciate the guidance and support you have provided.

I am committed to ensuring a smooth transition during my remaining time here. I am happy to assist in training my replacement and completing all outstanding projects to the best of my ability.

Thank you again for the various opportunities for growth and development I have experienced at [Company Name]. I wish you and the company all the very best for continued success in the future.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]<turn|>
